name: OpenSpec change
about: Plan cross-team work before implementation
title: "[OpenSpec] "
labels: openspec
assignees: ""
---

## Change ID

`<change-id>`

## Owner

Runtime / Policy / Knowledge / Evaluation / Mod/API

## Problem

What are we trying to make true?

## Affected Contracts

- [ ] Runtime
- [ ] Policy
- [ ] Knowledge
- [ ] Evaluation
- [ ] Mod/API
- [ ] None

## Expected Artifacts

- [ ] `openspec/changes/<change-id>/proposal.md`
- [ ] `openspec/changes/<change-id>/specs/.../spec.md`
- [ ] `openspec/changes/<change-id>/design.md`
- [ ] `openspec/changes/<change-id>/tasks.md`

## Done When

- [ ] `openspec validate --all` passes
- [ ] Affected owners reviewed the spec
- [ ] Implementation PR is linked or explicitly not needed
